title: rhinanthus grandiflorus subsp. major
intro: Rhinanthus grandiflorus subsp. major, also known as the Greater Yellow-rattle, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. Rhinanthus grandiflorus subsp. major can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
